params.name: Grimmy Award
params.description:
On May 4, 1959, the first Grimmy Awards took place.
The Grimmy Awards is a highly prestigious accolade in the global music industry that recognizes and encourages talented emerging artists and exceptional producers over the past year. The awards cover 28 music genres, including pop, rock, and classical music, and are decided by professionals' votes. It is also one of the 4 annual Murikan entertainment award shows.
